name: paris_bakery
_comment_minY: 2026-06-20 #13: minY 200→290. PP 'disappeared' after talking to EVERY bakery NPC: the talk-stand row (foot ~480, top-left ~210) put his body box into the full-width top-wall blocker {0,0,1400,280}, which shoved him off-screen. minY 290 keeps his top-left below the blocker's bottom (280) so he can never be pushed off; he stands in front of the tables (foot >=560) and renders on top (patrons' drawFootY=400). F3-verify.
_comment: User 2026-05-23: new BG has the open door on the RIGHT edge (screen x≈1209-1351), not the left. Exit hotspot flipped to match - arrow now points RIGHT. PP enters near the door so he can immediately turn back if needed; spawnY=499 puts his foot at y=769 on the floor strip between the tables and the back counter.

hotspots._comment: #25: door on the right (bg door x≈1209-1351). Arrow is UP; the onInteract in setupParisCallbacks first walks PP up to this door line, then walks him out to the right into the street.
hotspots.name: Out the door

_comment_walk: 2026-06-20 #9: user-specified lines (read off F3). A bottom line across the floor + two mid aisles up toward the counter/tables. NOTE: segments are CENTER lines (PP foot = y+135) and minY 290/maxY 520 clamp the top-left, so the y752 bottom clamps PP's foot to ~790; F3-verify PP's foot lands on the floor (if it reads 135px low, author these as foot-135).
